current_run.problem_name: Hidden Cyclic Bitwise AND of Ternary Products
current_run.description: Given an oracle that computes the cyclic bitwise AND of ternary products of an N-bit secret key s, find s. The function is f(x) = (x_0 * x_1 * x_2) & (x_1 * x_2 * x_3) & ... & (x_{N-2} * x_{N-1} * x_0) & s, where '*' denotes ternary product (0, 1, or 2) and '&' denotes bitwise AND. We are interested in the case where the output is a single bit.
